Notes: RPI won its final regular season home game.  Junior guard Kristin Kaczynski
led all scorers with 15 points, while Caitlin Vestal added 13.  For the
Brewers, senior Carleen Aubee scored 15 points.  Both teams finish the UCAA
season this weekend with games at William Smith and Hamilton.
